name: inkey-suggest-barrier
note: Operator UAT 2026-07-17: 'needs some barrier between suggested and chords in key...all chords has the scale select already to split'. In-key mode must render a labeled section boundary between the Suggested Chords row and the in-key palette (the All view's quality-chip row already provides this split). Asserts: a .inKeyLbl section label exists inside .inKeyLead, sits BELOW the suggest row, ABOVE the first palette chip, names the key, and draws a visible top hairline (the barrier).

steps.label: suggested row is showing (precondition for the barrier to matter)
a labeled barrier exists between suggested and the in-key palette: .inKeyLbl below the sugg row, above the first palette chip, naming the key
steps.js: (function(){var lbl=document.querySelector('.inKeyLead .inKeyLbl');if(!lbl)return false;var sugg=document.querySelector('#suggest .suggRow');var chip=document.querySelector('.inKeyLead .ccChips > *, .inKeyLead .keChordGrid > *, .inKeyLead > :not(.inKeyLbl)');if(!sugg||!chip)return false;var lb=lbl.getBoundingClientRect(),sb=sugg.getBoundingClientRect(),cb=chip.getBoundingClientRect();var t=(lbl.textContent||'').toLowerCase();return lb.top>=sb.bottom && lb.bottom<=cb.top+1 && t.indexOf('chords in')>=0 && t.indexOf('c')>=0;})()

steps.label: the barrier draws a visible top hairline (group separation, not just text)
